message:
test: add component tests for core UI, landing sections, mobile, and onboarding

Add 11 new vitest + @testing-library/react test files covering:

Core UI components:
- BottomNav: mobile navigation rendering (Browse, Bundles, Search, Settings)
- EmptyState: variant rendering (default, search, filter, error) with
  userEvent interactions for EmptyStateInline
- KeyboardShortcutsModal: open/close states, category grouping, shortcut
  display
- ScrollProgressBar: aria-hidden, default/custom height, className prop
- SortSelector: aria-label, combobox trigger, className passthrough

Landing page sections:
- FeaturesSection: heading, badge, all 8 feature titles verification
- HowItWorksSection: heading, badge, 3-step flow with numbering
- PricingPreviewSection: heading, badge, Free/Pro plan card rendering
- TestimonialsSection: heading, badge, 3 author cards with roles

Mobile & onboarding:
- SwipeHint: swipe text, Copy/Basket labels, dismiss button callback
- GestureHint: swipe/double-tap/long-press/combined gesture types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
